response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is technically well-qualified — strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes, and AI-agent experience — but represents a severe seniority mismatch for a junior/mid-level role. With roughly 15 years of experience and a Staff Software Engineer title, the risk of rapid disengagement, salary misalignment, or the candidate simply reframing the role to suit a senior scope are all high. The location discrepancy (Lagos listed, Berlin phone number) also introduces ambiguity around the high on-site presence requirement. A short screening call to understand motivation for applying at this level is warranted before investing further.
strengths: Deep, production-proven TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple high-scale environments (Optilyz, Dunnhumby, RIDE Capital)
Strong software craftsmanship culture — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, clean architecture — directly matching the role's stated interest in clean software
LLM/AI-agent integration experience and AWS CDK usage directly cover the most valuable nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff/Senior with ~15 years of experience applying for an entry-level role creates significant retention, compensation, and role-scope alignment risk
Location listed as Lagos, Nigeria conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement; the Berlin phone number creates ambiguity that must be resolved before proceeding
No explicit PostgreSQL or NestJS experience mentioned — the listed stack leans toward MongoDB and generic Node.js frameworks, leaving key preferred-stack gaps unverified
